**What area should Findable cover that it doesn't?**
SEO technique, GEO signal, llms.txt variant, platform-specific optimization, etc.

**Source or reference**
Link to documentation, a GitHub repo, or an article that describes the best practice.

**Safe or sensitive?**
Should this be applied automatically (safe) or documented in TODO SEO.md (sensitive)?
